Glow Lab Aesthetics

Our Treatments

Every treatment is tailored to your skin, your goals and your comfort. Click any treatment below to read more.

01

Anti-Wrinkle Injections

2 areas £175 · 3 areas £250

Soften expression lines using botulinum toxin for a refreshed, natural appearance.

Anti-wrinkle treatments using botulinum toxin are a safe and effective way to soften fine lines and dynamic wrinkles caused by facial expressions. This treatment works by temporarily relaxing targeted muscles, resulting in smoother skin and a more refreshed, youthful appearance.

We treat the three most commonly requested areas: crow's feet (around the eyes), the glabellar region (frown lines between the brows), and the frontalis (forehead lines). These can be treated individually or combined for a more balanced, natural-looking result. Results typically begin to appear within a few days, with full effects visible after two weeks.

Book This Treatment
02

Classic Lip Fillers

1ml £250

Enhance shape, volume and definition with hyaluronic acid filler.

Classic lip filler is designed to enhance the natural shape, volume, and definition of the lips using hyaluronic acid-based dermal filler. This treatment focuses on creating balanced, proportionate results — whether adding subtle volume, improving symmetry, or defining the lip border and cupid's bow.

Using precise injection techniques, the filler is carefully placed to achieve a soft, natural-looking enhancement while maintaining your unique facial features. Results are visible immediately, with final results settling over the following days. Includes a personalised consultation to ensure the desired outcome is achieved safely and effectively.

Book This Treatment
03

Dermal Fillers

Per 1ml £250

Soften nasolabial folds and marionette lines for a more youthful lower face.

Dermal filler for nasolabial folds and marionette lines softens deep lines and restores a smoother, more youthful appearance to the lower face. These lines can become more prominent over time due to volume loss and skin laxity.

Using hyaluronic acid-based filler, this treatment restores lost volume and gently supports the surrounding tissue, reducing the appearance of these lines while maintaining natural facial movement. The result is a refreshed, lifted appearance without looking overfilled or artificial. Pricing is £250 per ml, with the amount required depending on the depth of lines and desired outcome.

Book This Treatment
04

Skin Boosters

Each £125 · Course of 3 £325

Deep hydration and skin quality improvement to restore radiance and elasticity.

Skin booster treatments are designed to deeply hydrate, smooth, and revitalise the skin from within, improving overall texture, elasticity, and radiance. We offer two advanced techniques — mesotherapy and the Bio Aesthetic Points (BAP) method — allowing the most suitable approach to be chosen on the day of your appointment.

Mesotherapy involves a series of superficial micro-injections across the treatment area, delivering hyaluronic acid and nutrients directly into the skin. The BAP technique uses strategically placed injection points to allow the product to naturally diffuse for a targeted hydration boost.

A single treatment offers an immediate improvement in skin hydration and glow. A course of three treatments provides a cumulative effect, stimulating collagen production and strengthening the skin over time.

Book This Treatment
05

Skin Remodelling — Profhilo H+L

Course of 3 (BAP) £450

Advanced bio-remodelling to tighten, firm and rejuvenate skin without adding volume.

Our Skin Remodelling Package with Profhilo H+L is an advanced injectable treatment designed to deeply hydrate, tighten, and rejuvenate the skin from within. Profhilo is formulated with one of the highest concentrations of hyaluronic acid available, working beneath the skin to stimulate collagen and elastin while restoring firmness and elasticity.

Unlike traditional dermal fillers, Profhilo does not add volume. Instead, it spreads evenly under the skin to improve overall skin quality, hydration, and radiance — ideal for treating laxity, fine lines, and dull or ageing skin. Delivered using the Bio Aesthetic Points (BAP) technique, this package includes a course of three treatments for optimal, long-lasting results. The outcome is firmer, smoother, and more radiant skin with a natural, healthy glow.

Book This Treatment
06

Polynucleotides — Eyes

Each £125 · Course of 3 £325

Regenerative micro-injection treatment to revitalise the delicate under-eye area.

Polynucleotide eye treatment with mesotherapy is an advanced, regenerative aesthetic procedure designed to revitalise the delicate under-eye area. This treatment involves the precise micro-injection of polynucleotides — biocompatible molecules derived from DNA — combined with mesotherapy to deeply hydrate, repair, and stimulate skin at a cellular level.

Particularly effective for improving dark circles, fine lines, crepey skin, and loss of elasticity, resulting in a brighter, smoother, and more youthful appearance. A single treatment delivers noticeable hydration and skin quality improvement, while a course of three allows the skin to undergo a cumulative regenerative process, enhancing collagen production and tissue repair over time.

Book This Treatment
07

Glass Skin Facial

Each £150 · 3 sessions £400 · 6 sessions £750

Fillmed NCTF 135HA meso & microneedling for a luminous, glass-like complexion.

The Glass Skin Facial using Fillmed NCTF® 135HA combines mesotherapy and micro-injection techniques to deliver a powerful blend of hyaluronic acid, vitamins, amino acids, and antioxidants directly into the skin. This improves overall skin quality from within for a radiant, glass-like complexion.

Ideal for dull, dehydrated, or tired-looking skin, fine lines, uneven texture, and loss of luminosity. By stimulating collagen production and enhancing skin hydration, it creates a smoother, plumper, and more refined appearance with a natural, healthy glow. A single session offers an instant boost, while a course of three or six treatments delivers cumulative, long-term results. Visible improvements after every session with minimal downtime.

Book This Treatment
08

Chemical Peels

Each £75 · Course of 3 £200

Tailored professional peels targeting pigmentation, texture and dullness.

Chemical peels use carefully selected acids to exfoliate and resurface the skin, targeting a range of concerns including pigmentation, uneven texture, acne scarring, fine lines, and dullness. Each peel is tailored to your skin type and concern, ensuring a safe and effective treatment.

Results build with each session as the skin renews itself, revealing a clearer, more even complexion over time. With minimal downtime depending on the depth of peel chosen, this treatment is an excellent option for those looking to improve overall skin quality and achieve a brighter, more refined appearance. A course of three offers better value and allows the full benefits of cumulative peeling to take effect.

Book This Treatment
09

Microneedling

£75

Stimulate collagen and elastin for firmer, smoother skin with minimal downtime.

Microneedling uses a device with fine needles to create controlled micro-channels in the skin's surface, triggering the body's natural healing response and stimulating the production of collagen and elastin. This results in firmer, smoother, and more youthful-looking skin over time.

Effective for improving skin texture, reducing the appearance of fine lines, scarring (including acne scars), enlarged pores, and overall skin quality. The treatment is tailored to your individual skin concerns, with minimal downtime making it suitable for regular maintenance. Results improve progressively as collagen production increases in the weeks following treatment.

Book This Treatment
10

Hydra-dermabrasion Facial

£75

Non-invasive deep cleanse, exfoliation and hydration for an instant glow.

Hydra-dermabrasion is an advanced, non-invasive facial treatment that combines gentle exfoliation with vortex suction technology to remove dead skin cells, clear pores, and infuse the skin with hydrating and nourishing serums — all in one seamless procedure.

Unlike traditional microdermabrasion, hydra-dermabrasion uses water-based technology, making it suitable for all skin types including sensitive or dehydrated skin. It improves skin texture, reduces congestion, minimises fine lines, and restores a healthy, radiant glow. With no downtime, this treatment is ideal for an immediate skin boost before an event or as part of a regular skincare routine.

Book This Treatment
11

Dermaplaning

£25 · £15 when combined with another treatment

Remove dead skin cells and fine vellus hair for a smoother, brighter complexion.

Dermaplaning uses a sterile surgical blade to gently resurface the skin, removing dead skin cells and fine vellus hair (peach fuzz) to reveal a smoother, brighter complexion. This treatment improves skin texture and allows skincare products and makeup to sit flawlessly on the skin.

Suitable for most skin types, dermaplaning is a quick, non-invasive procedure with no downtime, perfect for regular maintenance or before a special occasion. It can also help minimise mild pigmentation and superficial acne scarring over time when performed consistently. The result is smooth, refreshed, and glowing skin with an immediate improvement in overall appearance.

Book This Treatment
